landing.heroSub: Reserve vehicles, validate licences automatically, and track fleet costs — all in one platform built for modern teams.

features.fleetDesc: Track every vehicle in real time — availability, mileage, and maintenance status.
features.teamDesc: Employees reserve cars instantly or in advance with built-in conflict detection.
features.aiDesc: Automatically validate driving licences with Gemini AI before approving reservations.
features.costDesc: Track fuel consumption, CO₂ emissions and costs with detailed PDF reports.

branding.fleetSmarterSub: Reserve vehicles, track usage, and keep your team moving — all from one place.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your fleet dashboard.

register.subtitle: Join FleetShare and manage your company cars.
register.name: Full name
register.passwordRule: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.heroSub: Create your account and get your team set up in minutes.

register.quickSetupBody: Register → Create your company → Invite your team → Start reserving cars

fleetCalendar.title: Fleet calendar

auditLogs.title: Audit logs

userDashboard.title: Dashboard

userBookingCalendar.title: Booking calendar

stats.title: Statistics & Reports
stats.rangeHint: Charts and trip totals use completed reservations whose end time falls in the range. Top users count reservations that started in the range.
stats.co2Hint: 2.31 kg/L Benzine, 2.68 kg/L Diesel, Electric uses grid factor.
stats.unitPricesSub: Set in Company settings (admin). Used for cost estimates below.
stats.co2Empty: No CO₂ data in the last 30 days
stats.efficiencySub: Ranked from most efficient (lowest consumption) to least. L/100km for fuel cars, kWh/100km for Electric/Hybrid.
stats.rangeEmpty: No EV/Hybrid cars with battery data
stats.serviceSub: Oil change >10,000 km since last service (fuel/hybrid); battery check for electric.
stats.costLeaderSub: Cars ranked by total estimated fuel/electricity cost (highest = least efficient).
stats.costLeaderSubPeriod: Completed trips in {period}. Cars ranked by estimated fuel/electricity cost in that window.
stats.fuelTrendNoPrice: Set fuel or electricity prices in Company settings to see estimates
stats.fuelTrendEmpty: No fuel expenditure data in the last 30 days

settings.hybridHint: Liquid fuel part; falls back to Benzine/Diesel if empty.
settings.legacyPrice: Legacy: single "Price per Liter" below (used if per-type prices not set).
settings.defaultKmHint: Allowed km per reservation. Users must give a reason if they exceed this.
settings.defaultConsumptionHint: Used when a car has no consumption set (e.g. 7.5).

noCompany.title: Join or create a company
noCompany.subtitle: You need to belong to a company to use the dashboard.
noCompany.successCreate: Company created. You are the admin.

aiChat.welcome:
Hi! I'm your **FleetStream AI Assistant**.

I can help you with:

- Understanding how features work
- Troubleshooting problems
- Answering questions about the system

Ask me anything!
aiChat.connectionError: **Connection error.** Make sure the Help-Bot service is running.
aiChat.cleared: Chat cleared. How can I help you?
aiChat.title: FleetStream AI
aiChat.devModeOnTitle: Developer mode on — click to switch to user mode
aiChat.devModeOffTitle: User mode — click to switch to developer mode
aiChat.devBannerHint: — responses include code snippets and file paths

legal.disclaimer: This document is provided as general information only and does not constitute legal advice. FleetShare operators should have policies reviewed by qualified counsel for their jurisdiction.

privacy.s1Body: FleetShare (“we”, “us”, “our”) provides a company car sharing platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect personal information when you use our website, APIs, and related services.
privacy.s2Body: We may process: account details (such as name, email, and role), company and fleet data you enter, reservation and vehicle usage information, driving licence data you or your organisation submit for verification, technical logs (IP address, browser type, timestamps), and communications you send to support. Exact categories depend on how your organisation configures the service.
privacy.s3Body: We use data to provide and improve the service: authentication, reservations, notifications, reporting, security, fraud prevention, and compliance with applicable law. Licence-related data may be processed by automated or AI-assisted checks where your organisation enables those features.
privacy.s4Body: Processing is typically based on contract (providing the service to your organisation), legitimate interests (security and product improvement), or consent where required. We may use subprocessors (e.g. hosting, email, analytics) under appropriate agreements. We do not sell your personal information.
privacy.s5Body: We retain information for as long as needed to operate the service and meet legal obligations. We apply technical and organisational measures designed to protect data; no method of transmission or storage is completely secure.
privacy.s6Body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to certain processing, and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. Contact your organisation’s administrator or us using the details your deployment provides.
privacy.s7Body: If servers or subprocessors are located outside your country, we rely on appropriate safeguards where required by law (such as standard contractual clauses).
privacy.s8Body: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the revised version with a new “Last updated” date. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance where permitted by law.

terms.s1Body: By accessing or using FleetShare, you agree to these Terms. If you use the service on behalf of a company, you represent that you have authority to bind that organisation. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.s2Body: FleetShare is a software platform for managing shared company vehicles, reservations, users, and related workflows. Features may change; we may modify, suspend, or discontinue parts of the service with reasonable notice where practicable.
terms.s3Body: You must provide accurate registration information and keep credentials confidential. You are responsible for activity under your account. Notify your administrator or us promptly of any unauthorised use.
terms.s4Body: You must not misuse the service: no unlawful activity, no attempt to breach security, no interference with other users, and no scraping or excessive automated access except as permitted in writing. Organisations are responsible for their users’ compliance.
terms.s5Body: You retain rights to data you submit. You grant us a licence to host, process, and display that data solely to provide the service. We may generate aggregated or anonymised analytics that do not identify individuals.
terms.s6Body: The service is provided “as is” to the maximum extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. Vehicle availability, licence validity, and on-road compliance remain your organisation’s responsibility.
terms.s7Body: To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or loss of profits, data, or goodwill. Our aggregate liability for claims relating to the service is limited to the amounts you paid us in the twelve months before the claim (or, if none, a nominal amount).
terms.s8Body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable to the contracting entity operating your FleetShare deployment, unless a separate written agreement states otherwise. Courts in that jurisdiction have exclusive venue where permitted.
